creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
I have search a time....

/usr/ports/MOVED

mail/elm+ME||2014-09-01|Not staged

The port was removed in 2014! from the ports tree.

So it is unsupported from FreeBSD.

Maybe, you will find a working version here:

http://www.elmme-mailer.org/elm-ME+2.5.html.
